title: retort.db inaccessible during evaluation — scores derived from fallback test run
evidence: sqlite3 -readonly experiment-5/retort.db returned exit code 14 (unable to open database file)
suggestion: Ensure retort.db is not locked by another process during evaluation

title: Original retort test_output.txt shows 'command not found: python' — scorer could not run tests
evidence: test_output.txt contains '(eval):1: command not found: python'
suggestion: Ensure the scorer invokes python3 or activates the venv before running tests

title: Lint score unavailable — no stored code_quality and linter not re-run
evidence: retort.db inaccessible; no standalone lint configuration in pyproject.toml
suggestion: Add ruff or flake8 to dev dependencies for automated quality checks
